title: Robust cooperative guidance of leader-follower AAVs against maneuvering target with false-data injection
authors: Jiayi Zheng — 国防科技大学智能科学学院
venue: IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems (TAES)
venue_full: IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems (TAES)
tldr: 针对仅有领机配备导引头的 leader-follower AAV 编队协同打击机动目标问题，提出混合 TLSTM-EM-KF 算法估计存在虚假数据注入（FDI）时的 LOS 角，结合刚体图论（rigid graph theory）与规定时间编队收缩（prescribed-time formation contraction）设计协同制导律，利用 LaSalle 不变原理证明收敛性，六架 AAV 对
pdf_name: Liu et al. - 2026 - Robust cooperative guidance of leader-follower AAVs against maneuvering target with false-data injec.pdf
